meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. An intermediate-level guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to build SaaS products.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle by building high-fidelity, functional SaaS prototypes. Use Antigravity to scaffold your UI and Claude Code to handle complex backend logic. By shipping a live, production-ready MVP rather than static mockups, you demonstrate technical execution, business logic, and revenue potential, effectively bypassing the need for traditional case studies.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. The market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about your output. Every day you spend without a live, revenue-generating product is a day your competitors are capturing market share. The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth—it is simply a lack of a shipping mechanism.

We are shifting the paradigm from 'designing for show' to 'engineering for growth.' By leveraging AI-assisted architectural tools, you can transform a complex SaaS concept into a functioning asset in hours, not weeks. This is your blueprint for turning zero experience into a high-converting portfolio that speaks louder than any resume.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Core Logic
steps.description: Identify a singular, high-value problem to solve. We aren't building a clone; we are building a tool that performs a specific, monetizable action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a SaaS landing page that focuses on conversion, including a hero section, a pricing table, and a feature set that highlights specific pain-point resolutions.

steps.title: Architecting the UI with AI
steps.description: Generate a high-conversion UI that feels premium. Speed is your competitive advantage here.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS that includes a clean sidebar, data visualization widgets, and a primary action button for user engagement.

steps.title: Implementing Authentication and Database
steps.description: Don't reinvent the wheel. Use existing secure protocols to handle user data and access control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Supabase authentication flows into the existing codebase, ensuring user sessions are handled securely with private route protection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npm install @supabase/supabase-js && npx supabase init"

steps.title: Building the Core Feature Engine
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the actual business logic. This is where your product becomes 'real' and marketable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript function that processes user input, interacts with an AI API, and returns a structured JSON response for the dashboard.

steps.title: Deploying for Market Validation
steps.description: A portfolio piece is only valuable if it is live. Deploy your project to a production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration file optimized for a high-performance Next.js application.

pro_tips: Never build a full suite of features; build one 'killer' feature that solves a burning problem to prove your technical depth.
Use AI to generate realistic mock data for your dashboard; a populated UI looks 10x more professional than an empty state.
Document your build process in a 'build-in-public' log; founders value the journey as much as the final code.
Prioritize mobile responsiveness early; most VCs and potential clients will view your portfolio on a phone.
Focus your documentation on the business logic and API integration, as this proves you understand backend architecture, not just UI design.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, publish your project to Product Hunt and share the GitHub repository with a detailed README explaining the business problem you solved. Use this live link in your portfolio to demonstrate your ability to ship.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to build your portfolio. The best way to show you are a developer is by putting a live, functional product in the hands of users. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
